pi_items.source: setup_task.sh explicitly filters and resets these exact employee IDs, and verifier.py evaluates them.
verifier.py checks for exactly 9 added records (3 education, 3 experience, and 3 skills) across the 3 target employees.
verifier.py enforces a passing score condition of >= 70.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically seeded Sentrifugo database records and a synthetic text dossier. The target employee IDs are exactly EMP002, EMP008, and EMP011. A critical discrepancy exists: the names provided in the dossier (Emily Chen, Michael Taylor, David Anderson) do not exist in the database, directly contradicting the actual names assigned to those IDs in the environment setup scripts (Sarah Mitchell, Ashley Johnson, Matthew Garcia). The verifier and setup scripts evaluate based solely on the IDs. The expected number of database record additions is exactly 9 (3 categories per employee), and the verifier passes at a score of 70.
